name: Coffman YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Coffman YMCA in Springboro, OH! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Cottell Park
description: Come play pickleball at Cottell Park in Mason, OH! There are 4 outdoor courts. The court lines are permanent. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Courts 4 Sports
description: Not open for pickleball spring of 2024

name: Franklin Community Park
description: Come play pickleball at Franklin Community Park in Franklin, OH! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Harmon Park
description: Come play pickleball at Harmon Park in Lebanon, OH! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Heritage Oak Park
description: Come play pickleball at Heritage Oak Park in Mason, OH! There are 11 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like water and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Lebanon Pickleball Courts
description: Lebanon Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Lebanon, OH. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Life Time Deerfield Township
description: Life Time Deerfield Township is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mason, OH. There are 6 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.

name: North Park
description: North Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Springboro, OH. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Patricia Allynn Park
description: Opened 7/1/2024 public courts, dedicated for Pickleball with three additional tennis courts with permanent painted pickleball lines

name: Rye's Barn
description: Rye's Barn is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lebanon, OH. There are 4 indoor concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, water, and food. The courts are private.

name: Warren County Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Warren County Pickleball in Lebanon, OH! There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.
